title: Service Version Disclosure: Apache httpd 2.4.52
description: Nmap identified explicit version: Apache httpd 2.4.52 on port 80
recommendation: Review and apply hardening via Ansible.

evidence_entries.observed: Apache httpd 2.4.52 (port 80)
Apache httpd 2.4.52 (port 443)
Apache config contains ServerTokens Full or ServerSignature On

title: Known vulnerable version detected: Apache httpd 2.4.52
description: Detected service version matches local CVE intelligence cache entries.
recommendation: Review and apply hardening via Ansible.

rule_meta.title: Apache HTTP Server 2.4.52 Request Smuggling Risk

evidence_entries.observed: Apache httpd 2.4.52

title: TRACE Method Detected via Nmap
description: Nmap http-methods script detected TRACE as a supported HTTP method. TRACE enables Cross-Site Tracing (XST) attacks and should be disabled.

evidence.observed:
Supported Methods: OPTIONS HEAD GET POST TRACE
  Potentially risky methods: TRACE

recommendation: Review and apply hardening via Ansible.

evidence_entries.observed:
Supported Methods: OPTIONS HEAD GET POST TRACE
  Potentially risky methods: TRACE
TraceEnable On found in server configuration

title: Self-Signed TLS Certificate Detected
description: The TLS certificate on port 443 is self-signed (subject and issuer both 'vm-apache'). Self-signed certificates are not trusted by browsers and indicate missing CA-signed deployment.
recommendation: Review and apply hardening via Ansible.

rule_meta.title: TLS Certificate Trust or Validity Failure

evidence_entries.observed: Subject CN=vm-apache, Issuer CN=vm-apache

cert_trust: certificate does not match supplied URI
cert_chain_of_trust: failed (self signed).
cert_extlifeSpan: 3650 days
cert_revocation: Neither CRL nor OCSP URI provided

title: TLS Issue: DNS_CAArecord
description: No DNS CAA record is configured. This does not expose data directly, but allows any CA to issue certificates for the domain unless restricted.

evidence.observed: TestSSL performed check 'DNS_CAArecord' and returned vague value: '--'

recommendation: Review and apply hardening via Ansible.

evidence_entries.observed: TestSSL performed check 'DNS_CAArecord' and returned vague value: '--'

title: TLS Issue: BREACH
description: The server is vulnerable to the BREACH attack; HTTP compression on HTTPS responses can leak secret tokens.

recommendation: Review and apply hardening via Ansible.
